HTML templates, Flask app initialization, tests, version control, license, project config, and README.

## Folders
- **[js_example](js_example/README.md)**: HTML templates for JavaScript examples and Flask application initialization with routes for templates and POST requests.
- **[tests](tests/README.md)**: Pytest fixtures and tests for template rendering and addition in a Flask app.

## Files
- **[.gitignore](.gitignore.md)**: Specifies files and directories to ignore in version control for a Flask JavaScript example project.
- **[LICENSE.rst](LICENSE.rst.md)**: BSD-3-Clause license for the Flask JavaScript examples.
- **[pyproject.toml](pyproject.toml.md)**: Configuration for a Flask project demonstrating AJAX requests, with dependencies and test settings.
- **[README.rst](README.rst.md)**: Demonstrates posting form data and processing JSON responses using JavaScript with Flask.
